highlights.text: Targets for this move given at 4pm Monday were: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is can head back up to 6925 range resistance.
One of those cycles is ES goes elevator down in a vertical flush cutting through every support.
I wrote on Monday at 4pm: “The only possible option here would be a Failed Breakdown of Monday’s daily low which is at 6832 now.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.

post_title: Massive Trend Move Up Finally For SPX. How Much Fuel Do Bulls Have? Feb 26 Plan
